Welcome to CryptoPunks.eth, a new and innovative NFT marketplace dedicated exclusively to the iconic 10,000 CryptoPunks collection. A cutting-edge platform that offers a seamless and secure environment for trading the original collectible digital asset CryptoPunks. Our mission is to be the ultimate destination for Punk collectors, traders, and enthusiasts by providing new features and regular maintenance at the direction of the CryptoPunks community. You are encouraged to join our Discord and follow us on X, but most importantly have fun!

Copying a bid is a powerful feature but could be used to bait unsuspecting users.

Confirm disguise bid

To disguise this trait bid as a custom bid, the app will include random CryptoPunk token IDs from the Yuga Labs wallet in how the bid is presented (for example in previews and notifications).

Those IDs are used as decoys on the assumption that Yuga Labs will not accept bids on them, so holders of those punks are unlikely to see them as actionable offers against their NFTs.
